name: theme-alpine
description: Custom Alpine theme for asit.blog with local preview and Agentation feedback

scripts.dev: npm run setup && npm run sync && concurrently -k -n hugo,agentation,overlay -c blue,green,magenta "hugo -s dev server -D --port 1313" "npx agentation-mcp server" "npm run dev:overlay --prefix preview"
scripts.build: npm run setup && npm run sync && hugo -s dev -D
